chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitutional Petition No. D- 308 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 17.04.2025. Mr. Shehriyar Imdad Awan, AAG. ***************** None present for the petitioner nor any intimation received. This petition was filed in the year 2022 and lastly fixed before the Court on 30.03.2022 when notices were issued to respondents as well as Additional Advocate General Sindh thereafter no efforts have been taken by the petitioner or his counsel to proceed with the matter which reflects that they have lost interest in the matter. Accordingly instant Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Irfan/PA
